channel.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário

item.title: Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica - Diário
item.description:
🚨 Boletim de Cyber Segurança - Técnica
Visão geral:
• 3 com severidade Crítica
• 19 com severidade Alta
• 27 novas CVEs
• 4 novos advisories/exploits

────────────────────────────────────
Infraestrutura - Docker / ESX / Elastic / Grafana / Nginx / VMware / Zabbix

🚨 CVE-2026-28261 - Elastic
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Elastic
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.8
Resumo:
Dell Elastic Cloud Storage, version 3.8.1.7 and prior, and Dell ObjectScale, versions prior to 4.1.0.3 and version 4.2.0.0, contains an Insertion of Sensitive Information into Log File vulnerability. A low privileged attacker with local access could potentially exploit this vulnerability, leading to secret exposure. The attacker may be able to use the exposed secret to access the vulnerable system with privileges of...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28261
 
🚨 CVE-2026-31842 - Nginx
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Nginx
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.5
Resumo:
Tinyproxy through 1.11.3 is vulnerable to HTTP request parsing desynchronization due to a case-sensitive comparison of the Transfer-Encoding header in src/reqs.c. The is_chunked_transfer() function uses strcmp() to compare the header value against "chunked", even though RFC 7230 specifies that transfer-coding names are case-insensitive. By sending a request with Transfer-Encoding: Chunked, an unauthenticated remote a...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-31842
 
🚨 CVE-2026-34977 - Docker
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Aperi'Solve is an open-source steganalysis web platform. Prior to 3.2.1, when uploading a JPEG, a user can specify an optional password to accompany the JPEG. This password is then directly passed into an expect command, which is then subsequently passed into a bash -c command, without any form of sanitization or validation. An unauthenticated attacker can achieve root-level RCE inside the worker container with a sin...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34977
 
📰 VMware Advanced Memory Tiering Tips for Success
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: VMware
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.0
Resumo:
Your Practical Guide to Doubling Memory Without Doubling Your Budget This document provides tips for successfully deploying VMware Advanced Memory Tiering with NVMe on VCF 9.0. Let’s Talk About Memory Tiering Resource Hub: Memory Tiering Resource Hub Memory Tiering with NVMe is one of the standout features in VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) 9.0, and honestly, …
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/07/vmware-advanced-memory-tiering-tips-for-success/
 
📰 VMware Cloud Foundation Edge 9.0: Two-Host Edge Site Deployment with Brownfield Import
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: ESX
Fonte: https://blogs.vmware.com/feed
CVSS: 9.0
Resumo:
In our previous blog post, we explored how VMware Cloud Foundation (VCF) Edge 9.0 enables organizations to deploy single-host edge sites that support both VM and container workloads, dramatically reducing edge footprint and capital expenditure. While single-host deployments excel in space-constrained environments, many organizations require additional resilience and capacity at their edge locations.
Link: https://blogs.vmware.com/cloud-foundation/2026/04/07/vcf-edge-brownfield-import-two-host-deployment/
 
📰 Critical Docker Vulnerability Allows Attackers to Bypass Authorization and Access Host Systems - cyberpress.org
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Docker, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiY0FVX3lxTFB0dzJ6N2NTdm14NmZHakdmT0tkVERrMHJQUVRJcWpTb284YmdadUxxMldwMzFwem1qMUJpTmFPSXZmbWwwRFFuZXZJaW5fczVEQl94ZnNDN2VxWllkT3lDWG5LQdIBY0FVX3lxTFB0dzJ6N2NTdm14NmZHakdmT0tkVERrMHJQUVRJcWpTb284YmdadUxxMldwMzFwem1qMUJpTmFPSXZmbWwwRFFuZXZJaW5fczVEQl94ZnNDN2VxWllkT3lDWG5LQQ?oc=5
 
📰 GrafanaGhost Vulnerability Allows Data Theft via AI Injection - Hackread
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a Grafana no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiggFBVV95cUxNTjA4eVdPQVM1TC1LVTduWXA4TEx0bHhZcm1IbkJKRmRabDNUa2NNYU94Ny1XUFJZOGpqTkxjZE5kXzFuTnpxUTRyTjVvVEJ1M2VMTlJ5TWp3Z0VsbnNQY09GTVc5OWRXRDRHa19TWHNMN2VWa1NCWExXcTMzTVhwbFpn?oc=5
 
📰 ‘GrafanaGhost’ vulnerability allowed for silent data exfiltration through AI workflows - siliconangle.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A notícia está relacionada a Grafana no contexto de segurança da informação, com potencial relevância para monitoramento, prevenção ou resposta.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiuAFBVV95cUxONC0xSW5GVlRqeHF5TGEyTzJSd1FiUG9BdXFCMmx3RDl6eTFJT0ViNkY4QWhzRU1XSk42aWJFVU9sSzFzNGJWYjVLWmNDeGl6Rm1HY200aUxaRFd6LWtRa2NLd0poQXVUamJBaWhMUXhwbEQxdHhVQWlWYnFhUVRtVDNHbnVoWFBORmJWb1Myd0JVeFdOS29PcXdPRGUtTFdaNnJ4UFpPUUItdXZ0U2ItZWZRQWxveV9U?oc=5
 
📰 Docker Authorization Bypass Flaw Exposed Hosts to Potential Attackers - gbhackers.com
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Docker
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Docker, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
📰 GrafanaGhost: Attackers Can Abuse Grafana to Leak Enterprise Data - SecurityWeek
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Grafana
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação relata um cenário de ameaça, incidente ou comprometimento relacionado a Grafana, no contexto de segurança da informação.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Segurança - Acronis / Axur / Check Point / Harmony SASE / Qualys / SentinelOne

🚨 Max severity Flowise RCE vulnerability now exploited in attacks
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Hackers are exploiting a maximum-severity vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2025-59528, in the open-source platform Flowise for building custom LLM apps and agentic systems to execute arbitrary code.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/max-severity-flowise-rce-vulnerability-now-exploited-in-attacks/
 
🚨 Docker CVE-2026-34040 Lets Attackers Bypass Authorization and Gain Host Access
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: 8.8
Resumo:
A high-severity security vulnerability has been disclosed in Docker Engine that could permit an attacker to bypass authorization plugins (AuthZ) under specific circumstances. The vulnerability, tracked as CVE-2026-34040 (CVSS score: 8.8), stems from an incomplete fix for CVE-2024-41110, a maximum-severity vulnerability in the same component that came to light in July 2024.
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/docker-cve-2026-34040-lets-attackers.html
 
🚨 CVE-2026-28388 - Check Point
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: Check Point
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Issue summary: When a delta CRL that contains a Delta CRL Indicator extension is processed a NULL pointer dereference might happen if the required CRL Number extension is missing. Impact summary: A NULL pointer dereference can trigger a crash which leads to a Denial of Service for an application. When CRL processing and delta CRL processing is enabled during X.509 certificate verification, the delta CRL processing do...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-28388
 
💣 New GPUBreach Attack Enables Full CPU Privilege Escalation via GDDR6 Bit-Flips
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: The Hacker News
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
New academic research has identified multiple RowHammer attacks against high-performance graphics processing units (GPUs) that could be exploited to escalate privileges and, in some cases, even take full control of a host. The efforts have been codenamed GPUBreach, GDDRHammer, and GeForge. GPUBreach goes a step further than GPUHammer, demonstrating for the first time that
Link: https://thehackernews.com/2026/04/new-gpubreach-attack-enables-full-cpu.html
 
💣 Hackers exploit critical flaw in Ninja Forms WordPress plugin
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A critical vulnerability in the Ninja Forms File Uploads premium add-on for WordPress allows uploading arbitrary files without authentication, which can lead to remote code execution.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/hackers-exploit-critical-flaw-in-ninja-forms-wordpress-plugin/
 
💣 Qualys warns exploitation is outpacing manual patching - SecurityBrief Australia
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Qualys
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo Qualys. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMikwFBVV95cUxQVTU1cFI2QUxYZjl3Q2tURGFqNDRNVjkzb21aSDhJc0tqZVJWc2pXWDQ1Sl9aMGdqTlg2aGtCMGYxdEVXZkxsYTVCOExjUkItdUY0VVdad1BLbVJRTmZfNzl1WFlObTV2YUZBenhiV0NUYm1XcmRMMThKLW5taW5sZ0VDSnBqTzJmSEh4c05UbXlvU2M?oc=5
 
📰 Snowflake customers hit in data theft attacks after SaaS integrator breach
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: SentinelOne
Fonte: BleepingComputer
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Over a dozen companies have suffered data theft attacks after a SaaS integration provider was breached and authentication tokens stolen.
Link: https://www.bleepingcomputer.com/news/security/snowflake-customers-hit-in-data-theft-attacks-after-saas-integrator-breach/
 
────────────────────────────────────
Sistemas / Cloud - 1Password / Azure / Office / Ubuntu / Windows Server / WordPress

🚨 CVE-2026-0740 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Crítica
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 9.8
Resumo:
The Ninja Forms - File Uploads plugin for WordPress is vulnerable to arbitrary file uploads due to missing file type validation in the 'NF_FU_AJAX_Controllers_Uploads::handle_upload' function in all versions up to, and including, 3.3.26. This makes it possible for unauthenticated attackers to upload arbitrary files on the affected site's server which may make remote code execution possible. Note: The vulnerability wa...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-0740
 
🚨 CVE-2026-34045 - Windows Server
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Windows Server
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 8.2
Resumo:
Podman Desktop is a graphical tool for developing on containers and Kubernetes. Prior to 1.26.2, an unauthenticated HTTP server exposed by Podman Desktop allows any network attacker to remotely trigger denial-of-service conditions and extract sensitive information. By abusing missing connection limits and timeouts, an attacker can exhaust file descriptors and kernel memory, leading to application crash or full host f...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-34045
 
🚨 CVE-2026-39361 - Azure
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Azure
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 7.7
Resumo:
OpenObserve is a cloud-native observability platform. In 0.70.3 and earlier, the validate_enrichment_url function in src/handler/http/request/enrichment_table/mod.rs fails to block IPv6 addresses because Rust's url crate returns them with surrounding brackets (e.g. An authenticated attacker can reach internal services blocked from external access. On cloud deployments this enables retrieval of IAM credentials via AWS...
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-39361
 
🚨 USN-8152-1: Linux kernel (OEM) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
It was discovered that some AMD Zen 5 processors supporting RDSEED instruction did not properly handle entropy, potentially resulting in the consumption of insufficiently random values. A local attacker could possibly use this issue to influence the values returned by the RDSEED instruction causing loss of confidentiality and integrity. (CVE-2025-62626) Qualys discovered that several vulnerabilities existed in the Ap...
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8152-1
 
🚨 USN-8153-1: Salt vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Zach Malone discovered that Salt did not properly handle permissions to cache data. A local attacker could possibly use this issue to obtain sensitive information. (CVE-2015-8034) Dylan Frese discovered that Salt incorrectly allowed users to specify PAM service. An attacker could possibly use this issue to bypass authentication.
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8153-1
 
🚨 USN-8148-4: Linux kernel (Real-time) vulnerabilities
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: Ubuntu
Fonte: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/rss.xml
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
Several security issues were discovered in the Linux kernel. An attacker could possibly use these to compromise the system. This update corrects flaws in the following subsystems: - Cryptographic API; - Netfilter; - Network traffic control; (CVE-2026-23060, CVE-2026-23074, CVE-2026-23111)
Link: https://ubuntu.com/security/notices/USN-8148-4
 
🚨 CVE-2025-15611 - WordPress
 
Criticidade: Média
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: NVD
CVSS: 5.4
Resumo:
The Popup Box WordPress plugin before 5.5.0 does not properly validate nonces in the add_or_edit_popupbox() function before saving popup data, allowing unauthenticated attackers to perform Cross-Site Request Forgery attacks. When an authenticated admin visits a malicious page, the attacker can create or modify popups with arbitrary JavaScript that executes in the admin panel and frontend.
Link: https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2025-15611
 
💣 Hackers exploit critical flaw in Ninja Forms WordPress plugin - BleepingComputer
 
Criticidade: Alta
Ferramenta: WordPress
Fonte: Google News RSS
CVSS: N/D
Resumo:
A publicação menciona exploração ativa, técnica ofensiva ou abuso envolvendo WordPress. Consulte o link para entender melhor o impacto e as recomendações.
Link: https://news.google.?oc=5
 
────────────────────────────────────
Período: Notícias do período de 06/04/2026 até 08/04/2026.
